title: Roadmaps
description: This section groups the longer lived plans, target architecture documents, and background analyses that shape upcoming work.
html:
Roadmaps

This section groups the longer-lived plans, target architecture documents, and background analyses that shape upcoming work.

Start here

  • target-architecture-2026.md: target architecture for the next 6 to 12 months
  • target-architecture-2026-execution-plan.md: execution plan for that target
  • gui-finalization/00-overview.md: desktop app finalization track
  • auto-detection-mvp.md: ML auto-detection delivery plan

Structure

Active roadmaps

  • auto-detection-mvp.md
  • error-handling.md

Architecture and platform track

  • target-architecture-2026.md
  • target-architecture-2026-comex-cto.md
  • target-architecture-2026-execution-plan.md

Sub-tracks

  • gui/DESKTOP_APP.md: GUI phase rollouts
  • gui-finalization/00-overview.md: desktop app, binary distribution, plugins
  • gui/ARCHITECTURE_MULTI_PROJETS.md: shared resources and multi-project model
  • gui/BINARY_DISTRIBUTION.md: binary packaging and release constraints
  • gui/PLUGINS_WITH_BINARY.md: plugin constraints in binary distributions

Related dated material

  • docs/plans/: individual feature plans
  • docs/brainstorms/: exploratory sessions preceding plans
  • docs/ideation/: open ideation notes
  • docs/_archive/08-roadmaps/: retired roadmaps and superseded design documents
